elements.name: nte-input
elements.description: Minimal input frame with label, control container and validation area. Actual input rendering is provided by statically registered plugins.

slots.name: validation
slots.description: Custom validation content rendered below the control.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Input type used to resolve the registered plugin. Built-in types include text, email, password, textarea, select, select-radio, checkbox and token-input.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label rendered above the plugin content.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder forwarded to plugins like the built-in text and textarea plugins.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current value used by plugins such as the built-in textarea, select, select-radio and token-input plugins. For select-radio and token-input this is handled as a string array.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Used by grouped plugins such as select-radio to switch from radios to checkboxes.

attributes.name: data-options
attributes.description: Option source for built-in option-based plugins such as select, select-radio and token-input. Supports semicolon-separated strings or JSON.

attributes.name: strict
attributes.description: For type=token-input: only configured option values may be added. Free custom tokens are ignored.

attributes.name: validation-message
attributes.description: Fallback validation text rendered in the validation area when no validation slot is provided.

attributes.name: invalid
attributes.description: Marks the frame as invalid and switches the border styling to the invalid color.
